title: Protocol: Aquatic Hyphomycete Spore Isolation for Culturing
author: WANG, ZIMING
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This protocol is one of the outcomes from the Aquatic Hyphomycetes Online Group, initiated and led by Fay Newbery, with experts from the FUNACTION consortium, and aquatic fungi enthusiasts across the UK and Europe. 
 This protocol will eventually become part of a collection, with the aim to help interested individuals to document aquatic hyphomycetes across the globe. 
 This document will be updated with contribitions from the AHOG group members.
steps_raw:
